name: Guangdong Yizumi Precision Machinery Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Yizumi Precision Machinery Co.,Ltd. designs, researches and develops, manufactures, sells, and services various molding machines in China and internationally. It offers injection molding machines, die-casting machines, rubber injection molding machines, and robotic automation systems, as well as high-speed packaging machines for use in various industries, including food packaging, beverage packaging, medical and healthcare, etc. Guangdong Yizumi Precision Machinery Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Foshan, China.
